title: Enhancement for Active Seniors (EASE)
text:
Enhancement for Active Seniors (EASE) - SupportGoWhere
Enhancement for Active Seniors (EASE)
Share link
Subsidy for Singapore Citizen households with at least one senior who meets age criterion and needs help to install senior-friendly fittings.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Up to 95% subsidy of improvement costs
Respond within 14 working days upon receipt of application
Apply via EASE e-Service or Mobile@HDB
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Depending on your flat type, the subsidy can cover up to 95% of the total improvement cost.

'Calculate Calculate Cost of HIP/ EASE Improvement Items' e-Service

Choose ‘EASE (Direct Application)’ under the selection type, indicate your flat type and the EASE improvements you wish to have.

If you are a senior living in a rental flat, your preferred EASE improvement items will be fully funded by the Government.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen household with a senior who is aged:

65 and above; or

Between 60 and 64, and requires assistance for one or more of the Activities of Daily Living (ADLs):

Eating

Bathing

Dressing

Transferring

Toileting

Walking or moving around

How to apply?

You can apply:

Apply for Enhancement for Active Seniors (EASE) Online via EASE

Mobile@HDB

You are required to submit a Functional Assessment Report if you are a Singapore Citizen flat owner with at least one member in the household aged between 60 and 64 who requires assistance for one or more of the Activities of Daily Living (ADL)

The Functional Assessment Report for the elderly aged between 60 and 64 must be endorsed by a qualified assessor such as a Singapore Medical Council fully registered doctor, and must be submitted together with your application form

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Branch Service Line: 6225-5432

Submit an enquiry

Book an appointment via e-Appointment service

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
